text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: Neither the web search nor any academic database returned a paper with the exact title "Generative ai for de novo drug design: recent advances, challenges, and future directions" attributed to Xuegong Liu, Qing Song, Yu Wei, and Yun Xu in Drug Discovery Today (2023). Similar papers exist (e.g., "Generative Models for De Novo Drug Design" in J. Med. Chem. and a Frontiers review with a close but distinct title), but none match both the exact title and the cited authors.
LINK: NONE
